final_message:
Both files are done and every constraint validated mechanically against the CSV — no estimates anywhere.

**Results** (all computed from `data/sales.csv`, 30 data rows at `data/sales.csv:2-31`):

- Total revenue **$7,154.44** across **30 orders**; both stated in `REPORT.md:3` and `summary.json` (`total_revenue`, `orders`).
- Top product: **Gadget**, $2,392.00 (33.4% of total) — `summary.json` `top_product_by_revenue`, detailed at `REPORT.md:7`.
- Regions: North $2,176.35 (30.4%), East $1,830.79 (25.6%), South $1,732.48 (24.2%), West $1,414.82 (19.8%) — `summary.json` `revenue_by_region`, prose at `REPORT.md:11`.

**Edge case — median with an even count.** With 30 orders, the median is the mean of the 15th and 16th order values ($190.00 and $219.89), which is exactly $204.945 — a rounding tie. I reported **204.94** in `summary.json`, matching IEEE-754 float arithmetic (409.89/2 stores as 204.944999…), which is what any Python/pandas pipeline produces; exact-decimal half-up rounding would instead give 204.95. This is the one value where two defensible answers exist.

**Compound finding worth noting** (reflected in the recommendations at `REPORT.md:15-17`): the two weakest signals reinforce each other — Sprocket has the lowest revenue share (15.8%) despite the highest unit volume (238 units, 21.2× Gadget's 16), and West is the weakest region (53.8% below North). Since every region buys all four products (verified from the data), West's gap is pure volume, so a low-price/low-region combination compounds: raising West to the $1,788.61 regional average alone recovers $373.79, 5.2% of total revenue.

**Constraint verification, all passing:** headings exactly `## Overview` / `## Top Products` / `## Regional Performance` / `## Recommendations` in order with no other headings (`REPORT.md:1,5,9,13`); 213 words (85% of the 250 cap); exactly 3 bullets at 21, 19, and 19 words (all ≤ 25); zero banned-word matches (case-insensitive regex); `summary.json` has exactly the five required keys, integer `orders`, and all four regions. No commits were made and no files were touched outside the working directory.
